query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: Diagonal bands of bright orange and blue light intersect against a background of intense white illumination and deep black shadows. A stepped structure or railing is faintly visible in the darker area on the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image is characterized by significant intentional motion blur, transforming the scene into dynamic streaks of light and color. The vibrant red, orange, and blue hues clash aggressively against blown-out white highlights, creating an abstract photograph where the subject is unrecognizable.
